inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per signage unit. Based on standard cost accounting (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly labor cost including wages and overhead. Industry standard from Maynard's Industrial Engineering Handbook.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Standard labor time per unit. Based on time studies (Lean/Six Sigma).

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct costs allocated to overhead. Typical range 10-30% (WERC benchmarks).

inputs.label: Desired Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Target profit margin on total cost. Standard financial ratio (CAPM).

inputs.label: Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of signage units in the bid. Volume affects economies of scale.

inputs.label: Complexity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjusts labor and material for design complexity. Based on ASTM E1699-14 standard for signage.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment (Six Sigma DMAIC).

thresholds.overheadRate > 30: Overhead rate exceeds typical benchmark (WERC). Consider cost reduction.
thresholds.profitMargin < 10: Profit margin too low for sustainable business.
thresholds.laborHoursPerUnit > 5: Labor hours per unit high; investigate process improvement (Lean).

suggestedActions: if overheadRate > 30 then 'Review overhead allocation and reduce non-value-added activities'
if profitMargin < 10 then 'Increase profit margin or reduce costs'
if laborHoursPerUnit > 5 then 'Implement Lean techniques to reduce labor time'
